validation_queries.error_message: Did not find jpeg_activity in amd-smi metrics
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE symbol LIKE 'device_jpeg_activity_%'

required_tables._comment: The actual number of samples will vary depending on the GPU. This validates presence of samples, not the actual number of samples.

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi GFX busy samples
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi gfx-busy samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_busy_gfx'

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi UMC busy samples
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi umc-busy samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_busy_umc'

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi MM busy samples
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi mm-busy samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_busy_mm'

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi monitoring GPU memory usage
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi memory-usage samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_memory_usage'

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi monitoring JPEG activity
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected activity in amd-smi jpeg-activity samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'device_jpeg_activity_%' and event.value > 0

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi monitoring GPU GFX clock frequency
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi gfx-clock samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_gfx_clock'

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi monitoring GPU memory clock frequency
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi mem-clock samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_mem_clock'
